steps.data: *, *::before, *::after { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; scroll-behavior: auto !important; caret-color: transparent !important; }

steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Configure WooCommerce store
update_option('woocommerce_store_address', '123 Main St');
update_option('woocommerce_store_city', 'Springfield');
update_option('woocommerce_default_country', 'US:IL');
update_option('woocommerce_store_postcode', '62701');
update_option('woocommerce_currency', 'USD');
update_option('woocommerce_product_type', 'both');
update_option('woocommerce_allow_tracking', 'no');
update_option('woocommerce_enable_signup_and_login_from_checkout', 'yes');
update_option('woocommerce_enable_myaccount_registration', 'yes');

// Create required pages
WC_Install::create_pages();

// Create blog page
$blog_page_id = wp_insert_post([
  'post_title' => 'Blog',
  'post_name' => 'blog',
  'post_status' => 'publish',
  'post_type' => 'page',
]);
update_option('page_for_posts', $blog_page_id);

echo 'WooCommerce store configured.';
?>

set_name('Theme Doctor Test Product'); $product->set_slug('test-product'); $product->set_regular_price('29.99'); $product->set_description('

A test product used by Theme Doctor for QA verification.

'); $product->set_short_description('QA test product.'); $product->set_status('publish'); $product->set_catalog_visibility('visible'); $product->set_manage_stock(true); $product->set_stock_quantity(100); $product->set_stock_status('instock'); $id = $product->save(); // Create a variable product $variable = new WC_Product_Variable(); $variable->set_name('Theme Doctor Variable Product'); $variable->set_slug('test-variable-product'); $variable->set_status('publish'); $variable->set_catalog_visibility('visible'); $vid = $variable->save(); echo "Products created: simple=$id variable=$vid"; ?>

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Create a test customer account
$user_id = wp_create_user('testcustomer', 'test-password', 'test@example.com');
if (!is_wp_error($user_id)) {
  wp_update_user(['ID' => $user_id, 'role' => 'customer',
    'first_name' => 'Test', 'last_name' => 'Customer']);
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_first_name', 'Test');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_last_name', 'Customer');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_email', 'test@example.com');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_address_1', '123 Main St');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_city', 'Springfield');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_postcode', '62701');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_country', 'US');
  update_user_meta($user_id, 'billing_state', 'IL');
}

// Enable BACS payment method
update_option('woocommerce_bacs_settings', [
  'enabled' => 'yes',
  'title' => 'Direct bank transfer',
]);

echo "Test customer created: $user_id";
?>

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

// Enable WP_DEBUG_LOG
$wp_config = file_get_contents(ABSPATH . 'wp-config.php');
if (!str_contains($wp_config, 'WP_DEBUG_LOG')) {
  define('WP_DEBUG', true);
  define('WP_DEBUG_LOG', true);
  define('WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY', false);
}

// Create empty debug.log
$log_path = WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/debug.log';
if (!file_exists($log_path)) {
  file_put_contents($log_path, '');
}

echo 'Debug log configured.';
?>

'Sample Post', 'post_name' => 'sample-post', 'post_content' => '

This is a sample blog post created by Theme Doctor for testing purposes.
